title: Integrated routine task
objective: Usar el presente simple en una conversación sobre rutinas.

activities.prompt: I get up at seven, eat breakfast and go to work.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha get up, breakfast y work.
Usa presente simple con tercera persona.

activities.feedback_correct: They usa la forma base go.
El adverbio puede ir antes del verbo principal.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con I y coloca usually antes de cook.

activities.prompt: I get up early. She works downtown. They study at night.
activities.feedback_correct: La rutina se entiende con naturalidad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Marca works y study sin añadir vocales.

activities.prompt: Julia gets up at six. She takes a bus and starts work at eight. She studies English at night.
activities.question: When does Julia study English?
activities.feedback_correct: La información está en la última frase.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about your weekday routine.
activities.feedback_correct: La rutina tiene secuencia y precisión.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa sujeto, verbo y terminación de tercera persona.

activities.prompt: Discuss your weekday routine, ask what the AI does and compare two habits.
activities.feedback_correct: La IA evalúa precisión, fluidez y comprensión.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA pide una reformulación y da apoyo en español si hace falta.

activities.prompt: Describe your routine for one minute and mention one other person's routine.
Describe your routine, ask two questions and explain one habit of another person.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Repasa la forma verbal relacionada con el error.
